nasb.text: And they came up on the broad plain of the earth and surrounded the camp of the saints and the beloved city, and fire came down from heaven and devoured them.

esv.text: And they marched up over the broad plain of the earth and surrounded the camp of the saints and the beloved city, but fire came down from heaven and consumed them,

cnv.text: 他們上來遍滿了全地，圍住了聖徒的營和那蒙愛的城，就有火從天上降下來，毀滅了他們。

ccb.text: 他们倾巢而出，布满大地，将圣徒的阵营和上帝所爱的城团团围住。那时烈火从天而降，烧灭了他们。

csbs.text: 他们上来布满了宽阔的大地，包围了圣徒的营地，就是那蒙爱的城。可是有火从天上降下来，吞灭了他们。
